name: Vegetable Stew
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Pared all-purpose potato, halved-inch cubes
1/2 cup Trimmed green beans, inch pieces
1 cup Coarsely chopped yellow bell pepper
1/4 cup Coarsely chopped green bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a medium skillet with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Melt margarine over medium heat. Add onion and cook until tender, stirring frequently for about 3 minutes.
3. Add potato, beans, and bell peppers; reduce heat to low and cook, stirring constantly for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients; cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Makes 1 serving.
